mapper.insert: insert into stock_alert (product_id, product_name, current_stock, alert_threshold, alert_status, alert_time) values (#{productId}, #{productName}, #{currentStock}, #{alertThreshold}, #{alertStatus}, #{alertTime})
mapper.update:
update stock_alert
alert_status = #{alertStatus},
handle_time = #{handleTime},
handle_user = #{handleUser},
where id = #{id}
